chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-7180 of 2017 Date Order with Signature of Judge For hearing of main case 30-01-2025. Mr.Saqib, Advocate holding brief for Mr.Syed Shoa-un-Nabi, Advocate for the Petitioner. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Petitioner seeks employment in a Government department on the basis of son quota. The Supreme Court has already declared the same to be unlawful vide judgment dated 26.09.2024 in the case of General Post Office Islamabad vs. Muhammad Jalal (Civil Petition No.3390 of 2021). In view of the foregoing this petition is prima facie misconceived, hence, the same is dismissed along with listed application(s). Judge Judge nasir
